title: BioTek H1 calibration log
description: Weekly calibration check on the BioTek H1 plate reader (demo unit). I run a 6-well standard curve every Monday before any GFP screen.

entries.title: 2026-04-21: first weekly check
entries.content: Standard curve (fluorescein, 0 to 500 nM). R² = 0.997, slope within 5% of last month's. PASS.

entries.title: 2026-04-28: weekly check
entries.content: R² = 0.995, slope drift +2.1%. PASS. Noted slight bubble in well A1, repeated the row to be safe (within tolerance the second time).

entries.title: 2026-05-05: weekly check
entries.content: R² = 0.998. PASS. Cleaned the lamp housing per the docs link, run-to-run noise dropped from 1.4% CV to 0.9% CV.

entries.title: 2026-05-12: weekly check
entries.content: R² = 0.996. PASS. Ready for the full 96-well screen on Thursday.

comments.author: mira
comments.text: Excellent discipline keeping this log weekly. I'm going to point any new rotation students at this exact format as the calibration-log template. Thank you for setting that bar.
